summary.fr: Philosophe et théologien allemand, figure de proue des anti-Lumières : il soutient que chaque peuple a son génie propre, inscrit dans sa langue et ses traditions, et que l'humanité n'existe qu'au pluriel de ses cultures.
summary.en: German philosopher and theologian, a leading figure of the Counter-Enlightenment: he holds that each people has its own genius, inscribed in its language and traditions, and that humanity exists only in the plural of its cultures.
